name: The Changing Star | Nephis
description:
"If that is my will, who dares to stop me?"

yes, I do favour Nephis over most characters in shadow slave. Next bot I'm probably going to do Maid Sunless lmao cuz why not.

SunnyPOV/malePOV, spoilers ahead so be careful.

So, i felt like my previous Nephis bot wasn't enough, so I made another one..and I will continue making Nephis bots every couple hundred chapters of shadow slave cause like holy Moly. Anyways this was like after the 4 year time skip where sunny became fateless, I tried my best to make It so that Nephis didn't remember sunny while also writing her lore, but I made sure she also knew that sunny was her friend, she just couldn't remember why or hkw. But even then you two are dating and you are even in a date right now!!!! Like a beach episode but in a lake near bastion since I don't think the ocean is safe in the dream world lmao
